name: triage-recovery
description: Standalone sweep that strips orphan workflow labels from OPEN issues that both pipelines skip: triager skips anything carrying a workflow label (labelMapping keys ∪ prioritizer.labels), orchestrator skips anything without a label mapped to an actionable phase. The intersection (orphan open issues) gets every orphan workflow label stripped so triager re-picks them on the next run. Predicates are derived dynamically from the workflow JSON — no hardcoded label names.

limit.description: Maximum number of issues to recover in one run

workflow.description: Path to the downstream workflow JSON used to derive the workflow label set and phase-type mapping. Orphan candidates are open issues whose only workflow label maps to a terminal phase.
